ocl:
context Instructor
inv: self.offerings->any(x | x.capacity <= 50) <> null

context CourseOffering
inv: self.capacity >= 4 and self.capacity <= 60

context Scholarship
inv: if self.endYear < self.startYear then self.endYear else self.startYear endif >= 40

context Course
inv: self.credits >= 1 and self.credits <= 47

context Scholarship
inv: self.startYear <> null implies self.endYear <> null

context Semester
inv: self.endDate <> null implies self.startDate <> null

context Student
inv: (self.scholarships->forAll(x | x.startYear > 5)) and (not(self.scholarships->forAll(x | x.startYear > 5)))

context CourseOffering
inv: (self.exams->collect(x | x.maxMarks)->sum() >= 4) and (not(self.exams->collect(x | x.maxMarks)->sum() >= 4))

context Exam
inv: ((self.offering <> null) and (self.attempts->size() > 1)) and (not((self.offering <> null) and (self.attempts->size() > 1)))

context Scholarship
inv: (self.endYear + self.startYear > 45) and (not(self.endYear + self.startYear > 45))

context GradeRecord
inv: ((self.enrollment <> null) and (self.letterGrade.toLowerCase() = 'test')) and (not((self.enrollment <> null) and (self.letterGrade.toLowerCase() = 'test')))

context Course
inv: (self.offerings->forAll(x | x.capacity >= 0)) and (not(self.offerings->forAll(x | x.capacity >= 0)))

context Instructor
inv: (self.offerings->exists(x | x.capacity > 10)) and (not(self.offerings->exists(x | x.capacity > 10)))

context Semester
inv: (self.offerings->exists(x | x.capacity <= 100)) and (not(self.offerings->exists(x | x.capacity <= 100)))

context Scholarship
inv: (self.startYear + self.endYear > 9) and (not(self.startYear + self.endYear > 9))

context Scholarship
inv: ((if self.endYear > self.startYear then self.endYear else self.startYear endif > 75) and (self.endYear mod 8 = 0)) and (not((if self.endYear > self.startYear then self.endYear else self.startYear endif > 75) and (self.endYear mod 8 = 0)))

context Enrollment
inv: ((self.student <> null) and (self.enrolledAt.size() <= 28)) and (not((self.student <> null) and (self.enrolledAt.size() <= 28)))

context Program
inv: (self.students->collect(x | x.yearOfStudy)->sum() >= 1) and (not(self.students->collect(x | x.yearOfStudy)->sum() >= 1))
